# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Cache dependencies
        uses: actions/cache@v2
        with:
          path: |
            node_modules
            .venv
            config-files
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-build-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-build-

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v2
        with:
          node-version: '14'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm install

      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v2
        with:
          python-version: '3.x'

      - name: Install Python dependencies
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          pip install -r requirements.txt

      - name: Build project
        run: |
          # Add build commands here

      - name: Save cache
        uses: actions/cache@v2
        with:
          path: |
            node_modules
            .venv
            config-files
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-build-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json') }}
